ddls:
CREATE TABLE "social_media_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user who made the post */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the post */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was last updated */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword associated with the post */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag associated with the post */,
  "user_handle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user handle associated with the post */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of post (e.g., tweet, status update, etc.) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image associated with the post */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video associated with the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_posts_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES social_media_platforms ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_posts_hashtag_id FOREIGN KEY ("hashtag_id") REFERENCES hashtags ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_posts_user_handle_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_handle_id") REFERENCES user_handles ("user_handle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_posts_keyword_id FOREIGN KEY ("keyword_id") REFERENCES keywords ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_platforms" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media platform */,
  "media_name" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the social media platform */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the social media platform */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for the social media platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheduled_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduled post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who scheduled the post */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media platform for the post */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the post */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the post */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date and time the post is scheduled to be made */,
  "post_time" TEXT /* Time of day the post is scheduled to be made */,
  "post_status" TEXT /* Status of the post (e.g., pending, published, failed, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduled_posts_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES social_media_platforms ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduled_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_analytics" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post received */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares the post received */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments the post received */,
  "engagement_rate" TEXT /* Engagement rate of the post (likes, shares, comments / reach) */,
  "reach" INTEGER /* Number of people who viewed the post */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of times the post was displayed */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of times the post was clicked */,
  "ctr" TEXT /* Click-through rate of the post (clicks / impressions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the keyword was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the keyword was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* Hashtag text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the hashtag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the hashtag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_handles" (
  "user_handle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user handle */,
  "user_handle" TEXT /* User handle text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user handle was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user handle was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_handle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_keywords" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_hashtags" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_user_handles" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "user_handle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id", "user_handle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_social_media_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "media_id")
)
